root.name: Insertion of New Slide After Slide 4 with Correct Title
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully inserted a new slide after slide 4 and gave it the correct title as specified in the task.

children.name: Slide Insertion After Slide 4
children.description: Checks if exactly one new slide was inserted and it appears immediately after slide 4 in the presentation.

children.name: Exactly One Slide Inserted
children.description: Verifies that exactly one slide was added to the presentation.

children.name: Slide Inserted After Slide 4
children.description: Checks if the new slide was inserted immediately after slide 4 (i.e., is now slide 5).

children.name: Inserted Slide Has Correct Title
children.description: Ensures the inserted slide's title is exactly 'Milgram's Obedience Study'.

metadata.task: Insert a new slide after slide 4 with the title 'Milgram's Obedience Study'
